name: Nekkar ASA
summary: Nekkar ASA operates in shipyard, drilling, and aqua cultural industries. The company offers shipyard solutions, including Syncrolift ship lifting systems used for the retrieval and launching of ships, as well as for launching concrete caissons, offshore structures, and wind farm equipment; and FastDocking products for the docking, launching, and repair operations of ships. It also offers equipment and upgrades, operator training, and spare parts; Intellilift for the offshore energy and other industries. The company was formerly known as TTS Group ASA and changed its name to Nekkar ASA in July 2019. Nekkar ASA founded in 1966 and is headquartered in Bergen, Norway.
